description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fluent.syntax that runs on push and pull requests to the main branch, but only for specific paths. The workflow has two jobs: unit and syntax. The unit job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix of Python versions, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and runs unit tests. The syntax job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, installs dependencies, and runs flake8 linting.
